title: Lunix Font
description: A font that is stylized a little differently... and smaller too... Y'know, at least you don't gotta see the vanilla font, right?
body:
![Lunix Font](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0611759db78548d848dd870ff2f04739d0aea9f7.png)

# Lunix Font
- A font that is smaller and stylized, but a little different from the vanilla font (of course).
- Overrides the vanilla (regular Minecraft) font for a new fresh look.
- I don't know what else to put lol, just check the gallery for a comparison (vanilla and Lunix).

# Characters Not Supported
- **Does not support non-latin european or accented characters.**
